original: textify(a||(a=(0,d.Z)(["Boarding an Aegis MS-XI from the ground is an unusual affair thanks to the significant size of its large ventral fin. To compensate for this, the MS-XI generates a hardlight boarding ramp sized to fit the local accommodations, and can even project an airtight docking tube for ship-to-ship contact in the cold vacuum of space.\n\n\t\tAn escalator just to the south provides for a quick lift into the cockpit."])))

textify(n||(n=(0,d.Z)(["Aegis has a reputation for high-end tech, and the MS-XI is no exception. Its cockpit controls are a chimerical split between beautifully actuated switches and a variable hardlight interface that allows for granular control over dozens of different systems. That polish extends beyond the controls to the pilot’s chair. It’s remarkably cushy for something so skeletal. Someone must have sold their soul for the engineering ability to so perfectly support the galaxy’s wide variety of spines with breathable mesh and mechanical linkages.

		An escalator to the south offers relaxing access to the boarding ramp.
		
		A jaunt through a hatch to the north provides passage to a security station."])))

textify(i||(i=(0,d.Z)(["The centralized security checkpoint lands itself at a hub of interlinkages within the MS-XI. Its gleaming lift offers access to decks above and below (not that you need go to either), while corridors stretch in every cardinal direction. Just to the north is the well-equipped mess. A small maintenance bay is positioned to the ship’s east, and the lavishly appointed Captain’s quarters lie west. Helm access is attainable to the south, of course.\n\n\t\tThe security station itself provides high resolution views of every point on the ship at the push of a button, as well the communications equipment to summon any crew member with ease."])))

textify(s||(s=(0,d.Z)(["The Captain’s quarters radiate style. From the luminous strips lining the bedframe to the fold-out nightstand with RGB holo-display, everything screams a love of technology in the most bombastic way. Illuminated controls allow the bed itself to be retracted into the wall and replaced a with a hardlight shower stall projected from the floor. Fully inventorying the available convenience gadgets would require hours spent pouring through manuals and options.\n\n\t\tThe luminous bulkhead door to the east allows for egress into the ship’s security area."])))

textify(r||(r=(0,d.Z)(["Even lighting spills from the luminous panels on the ceiling, bathing the maintenance bay with ceaseless, ideal working conditions. Modular racks and benches stand ready to host installed devices and projects. Dozens of power sockets provide ample opportunities to tap into the ship’s power grid. No matter its use case, the MS-XI stands ready to support it. Installed devices can be accessed here. A bulkhead on the western wall leads to the security station."])))

textify(u||(u=(0,d.Z)(["The mess’s hybridized ceramic tabletops aren’t just good for eating - they’re useful for preparing the food as well. Nothing short of a diamond edge or monofilament blade could scratch the high-tech surface. Inhospitable nanopatterns kill microscopic pathogens in less than five seconds. In an emergency, they can even be used for surgery when combined with the first-aid module bolted to the wall.

		A well-outfitted kitchen is gated to the east by a pair of alabaster double doors.
		
		The aft observation platform is just through a door to the north, while the cargo bay lies to the west."])))

textify(l||(l=(0,d.Z)(["MS-XI vessels come standard with a wide-open cargo bay and prefabricated storage containers restrained by magnetic clamps. Two floors high, it stretches into the deck below, and a secondary airlock on the western wall allows for rapid loading and unloading of cargo.\n\n\t\tYou may return to the mess hall to the east at any time."])))

textify(h||(h=(0,d.Z)(["Unlike most vessels in its class, the MS-XI comes with a fully outfitted kitchen. A professional chef could whip a decent buffet or flash-fry an entire New Texan varmint for a visiting Saurmorian dignitary. Heck, you could prep some mags-‘n-chez in less than fifteen seconds, you’re pretty sure.\n\n\t\tThe mess is just to the west, through an airtight bulkhead that appears wired into the fire suppression system. Apparently the chamber is rigged to be flooded with inert nitrogen in the event of a fire."])))

textify(c||(c=(0,d.Z)(["One cannot step into this observation area without their stomach dropping. The floor is fully transparent, creating the illusion that you’re floating in place above the faintly glowing reactor below. You could easily supervise your engineers from up here, if you wished, or look out the back window for a beautiful view of space, framed by the brilliant glare of the MS-XI’s engines burning below.\n\n\t\tThe mess lies south."])))
